text:
is a 1st year Attack Junior High School student.

Appearance

Franz has his brown hair in a buzz cut and dark eyes. He wears the typical Attack Junior High School boys uniform.

Personality

Franz is a kind person who enjoys being around Hanna. Like Hanna, he is not willing to admit that the two of them are dating.

Story

Franz arrives at Attack Junior High School and is in class 1-4. He attends the first-year entrance ceremony, and later flees while carrying Hanna when Titans invade the area.

Franz participates in the school's dodgeball tournament on Jean's team.

Franz and Hanna are embarrassed by Jean calling them a couple and deny the relation.

Following a challenge by the upperclassmen, Franz participates in the school's Sports Day games.

During recess, Franz tries some of Hanna's food.

In the school's 104th festival, Franz helps at Eren's chee-burgs stand. After Armin is prepped to be their salesperson, Franz blushes at how Armin looks in his getup, and a jealous Hanna shoves him for it. He later carries Hanna and flees when Titans appear and steal all of the food stands.

When teachers get in the way of Eren trying to head to the Titans' building to retrieve his chee-burgs, Franz, along with his classmates stand up for him and come between them. He later watches Ilse Langnar's broadcast of Eren and the others venturing into the principal's office, and cheers once Eren manages to retrieve a chee-burg.

Relationships

Hanna Diament - Franz and Hanna are dating; however, Franz is hesitant about revealing their relationship status to their peers.
